scripts.screenshots: mkdir -p ~/Desktop/ToDo-screenshots && xcrun simctl io booted screenshot ~/Desktop/ToDo-screenshots/screenshot-$(date +%H%M%S).png && echo 'Saved to ~/Desktop/ToDo-screenshots/'
scripts.icons:generate: npx @resvg/resvg-js-cli assets/icon.svg assets/icon.png && cp assets/icon.png assets/splash-icon.png && cp assets/icon.png assets/android-icon-foreground.png && cp assets/icon.png assets/android-icon-monochrome.png && sips -z 432 432 assets/android-icon-monochrome.png >/dev/null && cp assets/icon.png assets/favicon-tmp.png && sips -z 48 48 assets/favicon-tmp.png --out assets/favicon.png >/dev/null && rm assets/favicon-tmp.png && sips -g pixelWidth -g pixelHeight assets/icon.png
